name: Draft
description: Question is being authored and may be incomplete

name: Submitted
description: Author has submitted question for editorial review

name: In Review
description: Question is actively being reviewed by editor or reviewer

name: Needs Revision
description: Reviewer has requested changes from author

name: Approved
description: Question has passed review and is approved for publication

name: Published
description: Question is visible in the production question bank

name: Retired
description: Question is no longer used but retained for historical purposes

name: Archived
description: Question has been archived and removed from active workflows

name: Rejected
description: Question has been permanently declined and will not be published
